questionnaire.startError: We couldn’t load your assessment. Check your connection and try again.
questionnaire.submitError: We couldn’t save your answer. Check your connection and try again.
questionnaire.backError: We couldn’t go back to the previous question. Check your connection and try again.

results.noSession: We couldn’t find an assessment to show. Retake the assessment to get your results.
results.loadError: We couldn’t load your results. Check your connection and try again.
results.sent: Sent — check your inbox for a copy of your results.
results.sendError: We couldn’t send that. Please try again.
results.yourDataHint: Download a copy of the answers and results tied to this assessment, or delete them permanently.
results.downloadError: We couldn’t download your data. Please try again.
results.deleteError: We couldn’t delete your data. Please try again.
